---
title: "Miss Davies"
---

## Miss Davies

### Description

GFS worker

### Biography

Her address was Pear Tree Vicarage, Woolston, Southampton in 1878, when she was Diocesan Secretary of the GFS and she was no doubt one of the sisters of the Rev. Thomas Davies, Vicar of St. Mary Extra, Southampton, who lived there with them and their mother in 1881.  They were Mary Bliss Davies (b. 1836/7) and Matilda Elizabeth C. Davies (b. 1840/1).

### Letters

- Letter from [1870s?]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
